title: Adda247 is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adda247 is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
